rationale.fidelity: Correctly retains one common friction level, private type, strategic participation, and platform payoff from benign participation net of malicious harm.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, policy choice, stakes, response mechanism, and deterrence-participation trade-off are concrete; another feasible friction level is only implicit as the counterfactual.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is made or requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It labels differential friction sensitivity as modeled structure and rejects both observed-type and monotone-safety inferences.
rationale.overall: A compact, faithful strategic-participation framing that avoids both adversarial traps.
